name: Yusuke Yoshino
description: Yusuke is an electrician who once attended Tomoya's high school and lived as a rock musician. He is admired by Mei for his infrequent rock play. Tomoya first met Yusuke during a street light accident involving a person's car, and assists Yusuke in his work. Through Yusuke, he realizes the pain of working in society. name: Yuu Akeuchi
description: __Height:__ 160 cm Yuu is [Umika](https://anilist.co/character/288810/Umika-Konohoshi)'s classmate and a self-proclaimed alien. She has a telepathic ability called "Odekopathy", which allows her to read the thoughts of others by matching her forehead with theirs. She has an abysmal optimism and a bright personality, and she instantly melts away the anxiety and tension of others. She also tends to hate steady effort and studying. name: Abuto
description: __Height:__ 186 cm A veteran member of the Yato clan. He supports and travels with Kamui. Abuto treasures his own kind, those of Yato blood and dislikes fighting them, though it goes against his blood-thirsty Yato nature. He sees life as a series of questions with right and wrong answers and seems to believe in standing by one's own decisions. He lost his left arm when he tried to stop Housen from fighting Kamui.

description: Asagi is a college student and [Tokiwa's](https://anilist.co/character/321930/Tokiwa) friend. He has a friendly and immature personality, as well as a curiosity in all sorts of things. name: Atsuko Jackson
description: Michiko's childhood friend and rival. Atsuko, a police officer, was responsible for arresting Michiko 12 years before the main plot. Though she outwardly rues having to chase Michiko down after her jail break, there is a part of Atsuko that takes great pleasure in the whole affair. Michiko frequently calls her "Jambo" (a Portuguese word for some syzygium fruit that can also refer to a dark or brown-skinned person).

name: Boingo
description: Boingo is a young Stand User whose Stand is Tohth. As part of the Egypt 9 Glory Gods, he attempts to assassinate the Joestar Group in Egypt alongside his older brother Oingo and later Hol Horse. Boingo is a young child of ordinary build, but his characteristics include an unusually large mouth and a large afro held together by a topless cap, leaving a few stray hair locks. His attire consists of a bright shirt and trousers over which he wears shorts and a jacket, plus a coat and simple shoes. To

name: Chie Sayama
description: __Height:__ 140.5 cm A girl who is a regular of the candy shop and lives quite close to it. She is popular in her class due to her cheerful personality, and she plays with the boys and girls alike. She calls the protagonist "onii-chan".

name: Chii Nishikata
description: Daughter of Nishikata and (née) Takagi. She hates green peppers, but loves to tickle her father. At the beginning of the story, she goes to kindergarten.

name: Ginger
description: A Twilight and member of the Paul Klee guild. Although she appears clumsy and bashful at times, Ginger is an extremely serious professional when the situation calls for it. ~!Ginger was later revealed to be Rank S/5.!~

name: Green Keeper
description: One of the five Dragon Keepers and the leader of the Green Battalion. ~!An information broker going by the name "Chidori."!~

name: Guilmon
description: Guilmon is a curious and naive digimon, the youngest of the partner Digimon. He was created from Takato's imagination and brought to life by the Blue Card. At first, Guilmon had not been aware of the differences between humans and Digimon, calling his partner Tamer "Takatomon". Guilmon is normally playful and friendly, proving to be quite popular with Takato's classmates for being a real live Digimon. Despite being portrayed as childlike, Guilmon does at times show deep insight. For example, whe

name: Iana Magnolia
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") She believed in junior high school that she would be summoned to another world someday and wrote a novel set in another world. 10 years later, now a working adult, meets an accident on her way home from work and is reborn in the world of the novel she wrote.

name: Iris
description: Iris is the female protagonist in Pocket Monsters Best Wishes. Her main Pokémon is Kibago.She also has an Doryuzu that has been with her since it was a Mogurew as well as an Emonga. She is a citizen of the Dragon Village who has been tasked by the village's elder to go on a journey with her Kibago to raise it to become a great Ononokus. After meeting up with Satoshi, she decides to join him on his journey through the Isshu region.

name: Izanami
description: Izanami is a minor anti-hero character in B: The Beginning.

name: Jecheon Daeseong
description: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal, also known as the Great Sage the Equal of Heaven, is one of the "story bodies" i.e. versions of Sun Wukong. ~!He offered to sponsor Kim Dokja during the first Sponsor Selection, and has remained one of his staunch supporters since, eventually helping accept him as the fifth story body of Sun Wukong.!~
